/usr/bin/ar qc libNovaForgeApp.a CMakeFiles/NovaForgeApp.dir/src/NovaForgeApp_stub.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NovaForgeApp.dir/src/NovaForgeProjectContext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NovaForgeApp.dir/src/NovaForgeSession.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NovaForgeApp.dir/src/NovaForgeBootstrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NovaForgeApp.dir/src/App.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NovaForgeApp.dir/src/GameOrchestrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NovaForgeApp.dir/src/DataRegistry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NovaForgeApp.dir/Bootstrap/WorldBootstrap.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libNovaForgeApp.a
